headline: Is West Pharmaceutical Services (WST) Pricing Look Stretched After Strong 1 Year Rally?
summary: If you are wondering whether West Pharmaceutical Services at around US$300.68 is offering good value right now, the key is to separate price excitement from underlying worth. The share price has seen mixed returns, with a 1.8% decline over the last 7 days but gains of 18.0% over 30 days, 8.8% year to date, and 42.8% over 1 year, alongside 3 year and 5 year returns of 17.7% and 8.7% declines respectively. Recent coverage has focused on West Pharmaceutical Services as investors reassess...
